name: matrix_core_connector_boundary_v2_9
connector_missing_actions: tag creation as git ref/tag object
truth_boundary: Repository permissions are sufficient, but the exposed connector tools do not include workflow_dispatch invocation, tag creation, or native release upload. Manual GitHub Actions execution remains required.
next_best_action: Open GitHub Actions, run Matrix Core Release Asset on main with release_tag=matrix-core-v2.7.0, then verify release assets and complete clean-install/custody proofs.
